_meta.note: Canonical progress-as-code (fix-16). Auto-merged by docs/index.html over HTTP. 2026-07-09 full-audit + remediation (research/12): FIXED and re-closed glue-08 (accepted apt releaseinfo change -> ansible-pull converges ok=30 failed=0, pings green) and sbom-03 (cleared etckeeper ref-lock + stale index.lock -> commits clean, sweep 63/63). RETIRED sbom-01/02/04 (user decision): SBOM/Dependency-Track judged overkill for a home net + syft was OOM'ing the 8GB mini; sbom-nightly timers disabled on mini+rig and the `sbom` ansible role removed so convergence won't redeploy it (sbom-01/04 left in done as completed setup work, feature retired). fix-19 default-address-pools restored in daemon.json + docker role (converge had been stripping them). 137->139; sbom-02 not counted (retired). 2026-07-09 docs-debt audit: closed game-03 (heavy game servers on the rig) — AMP (MinecraftCross Java+Bedrock) + Palworld run 24/7 on the rig with public playit paths, protocol-ping verified; was reality-done/tracker-open. Audit also re-verified done-claims across dns/nas/ha/verify tracks against the live fleet: no other reality-vs-tracker mismatch found; reopen-suggestions empty. 2026-07-11 docs-debt audit follow-through (user decisions): Dependency-Track FULLY RETIRED — 3 NAS containers removed (compose down), Kuma 'NAS DepTrack' monitor + caddy vhost + homepage tile + nas.containers manifest entries all removed (SBOM feature was already retired 07-09). DELETED never-deployed/retired stack dirs: mini litellm (phantom fallback), tdarr, maintainerr, dependency-track; plus the retired sbom ansible role + scripts/inventory/sbom-nightly.*. frigate stack dir KEPT (genuine future plan, bannered NOT DEPLOYED). 2026-07-13 roadmap prune (#17, queue item 07, user-walked): CLOSED 5 tracker-drift items verified live-done (ha-05 Hue [14 light entities], ha-11 HA backups [queue 02], ha-16 HomeKit Bridge [HASS Bridge:21064 loaded], dns-04 DNS outage runbook+verify script, nas-00e NAS music mount at /mnt/nas/music) -> 141->146. RETIRED 7 (ha-03 HAOS-in-VM superseded by HA Green; ha-17 LiteLLM fallback superseded by accepted AI-SPOF; game-01 LinuxGSM superseded by AMP-on-rig; game-04 Tailscale-expose superseded by playit; nas-06 2nd off-site, nas-03 Tier-2 HDD, nas-30 beets — user chose retire). DEFERRED 4 (optional, no active plan): ha-08 ESPHome dongle, ha-13 mmWave presence, game-12 save-sync, game-14 launcher/RomM. KEEP as planned: docker-14, read-11, and all Bucket-D tracks (smart-home ha-04/06/07/09/10/12/14/15, security/DR sec-01/03/04 + glue-06/sbom-05 rebuild drill, analogue read-*, etc.). ai-01 KEPT and EXPANDED into its own initiative — a first-class local-AI build (OpenWebUI + opencode as best-in-class local coding tools, ops/skills agents across the home net); see the local-AI plan doc. 2026-07-14 full roadmap walk (user, task-by-task over all 66 remaining): CLOSED 10 already-done (handoff-05/06 B2 bucket+creds, seed-10 music e2e, read-01 Calibre, read-13 Obsidian Sync, ha-29 policy, read-04 KOReader-on-Kobo, read-11 iPod sync, game-06 in-home stream, game-07 remote-direct stream) -> 146->156. RETIRED dns-05 (fail-open: prefer bypass over blackhole). DEFERRED 14 (glue-06/sbom-05 rebuild drill; glue-01 UPS-no-budget; retro-07 handheld; ha-15 Frigate/Protect-enough; ha-20 locks; ha-24 ThinQ; ha-30 sensor-rollout ~$505-865; fut-01..06 2-5yr). KEPT 41 as active roadmap; scope notes: sec-03->only B2 Object Lock, ha-31->only what's ownable now, ha-32->SSH+git-config glue. All deferred hardware compiled into docs/hardware-shopping-list.md. 2026-07-14 research.md integration (user decisions): docker-14 CLOSED as delivered (static+dynamic+NAS-by-IP+auto-Tailscale Caddy hosting all live; Coolify PaaS half DROPPED — non-starter on the 8GB mini) -> 156->157. game-12 UN-DEFERRED (Ludusavi+Syncthing save-sync folds into the new tracked Syncthing-hub task). Hygiene done live: RomM pinned :latest->4.9.2 + functional health probe (romm-serving); stale maintainerr+deptrack Caddyfile vhosts removed. New research-derived tasks tracked in docs/research-integration.md (Vaultwarden data cutover, FOSS suite packaging, Syncthing hub, Ente Auth+YubiKey, RomM RetroAchievements dashboard, seed-11 public indexers, seed-12 Bitmagnet, seed-13 Whisparr). research.md corrected (Immich v2.7.5; RomM assets already backed up).

retired.sbom-01: 2026-07-09 (user decision): SBOM/Dependency-Track feature retired — overkill for a home network and syft was OOM'ing the 8GB mini nightly (Jul 04-08). Syft/Grype install left in place but the nightly pipeline is disabled. Left in done as completed setup work.
retired.sbom-02: 2026-07-09 (user decision): RETIRED — the nightly-SBOM->Dependency-Track objective is abandoned. sbom-nightly timers disabled on mini+rig; the `sbom` ansible role removed from site.yml so convergence won't redeploy it. Was failing on both hosts anyway (mini OOM, rig missing env file).
retired.sbom-04: 2026-07-09 (user decision): part of the retired SBOM feature (per-OS package manifest for syft). Left in done as completed work; no longer feeding an active pipeline.
retired.ha-03: 2026-07-13 roadmap prune (user): SUPERSEDED — HA runs on Home Assistant Green hardware (config entry `homeassistant_green` loaded live); the HAOS-in-a-KVM/libvirt-VM alternative install path is moot.
retired.ha-17: 2026-07-13 roadmap prune (user): SUPERSEDED — the AI-stack single-point-of-failure (rig-only, no fallback) is an accepted decision; the LiteLLM gateway + always-on fallback model won't be built. HA Assist uses the rig Ollama directly (queue 02 / #12).
retired.game-01: 2026-07-13 roadmap prune (user): SUPERSEDED — game servers run on AMP on the rig (Minecraft Java+Bedrock, 24/7), not LinuxGSM on the Mac mini.
retired.game-04: 2026-07-13 roadmap prune (user): SUPERSEDED — game servers are exposed to friends via playit premium (dedicated IP + NS-delegated domains), not Tailscale.
retired.nas-06: 2026-07-13 roadmap prune (user): RETIRED — one off-site (restic/Hyper Backup → B2) is enough; no second off-site (Borg/borgmatic → Hetzner Storage Box). Reversible if priorities change.
retired.nas-03: 2026-07-13 roadmap prune (user): RETIRED — Tier-2 media is re-acquirable; skipping the rotated external-HDD local backup.
retired.nas-30: 2026-07-13 roadmap prune (user): RETIRED — redundant with Lidarr, which already owns the music-library layout; no separate beets tag layer.
retired.dns-05: 2026-07-14 roadmap walk (user): RETIRED — NAT :53 redirect kills the gateway DNS fallback; operator prefers AdGuard-down clients bypass to gateway over a house-wide DNS blackhole (fail-open design).
